sections.paragraph: Psa 119:5, and אַחֲלֵי 2Ki 5:3, an optative particle, oh that! would to God! followed by a fut. Ps. loc. cit.; without a verb, 2 Ki. loc. cit. It is commonly derived from the root חָלָה; Pi. חִלָּה פָנִים to stroke the face, to caress, to beseech. But perhaps it is rather compounded of אָח and לַי = לוּ.
